glosses.ja: 追加料金; 割増料金

sentences.target: Ich zahle den Zuschlag für das Expresspaket.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtsaːlə deːn ˈtsuːʃlaːk fyːɐ das ˈɛkspʁɛs.paˈkeːt/

translations.de: Ich zahle den Zuschlag für das Expresspaket.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtsaːlə deːn ˈtsuːʃlaːk fyːɐ das ˈɛkspʁɛs.paˈkeːt/
translations.en: I'm paying the surcharge for the express parcel.
translations.es: Pago el recargo del paquete exprés.
translations.fr: Je paie le supplément pour le colis express.
translations.it: Pago il sovrapprezzo per il pacco espresso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我支付快递包裹的附加费。
translations.yue: 我畀快遞包裹嘅附加費。
translations.pt: Eu pago a taxa extra do pacote expresso.
translations.he: אני משלם את התוספת עבור החבילה המהירה.
translations.tr: Hızlı kargo için ek ücreti ödüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi trả phụ phí cho kiện hàng gửi nhanh.
translations.ar: أدفع الرسوم الإضافية على الطرد السريع.
translations.nl: Ik betaal de toeslag voor het spoedpakket.
translations.hi: मैं एक्सप्रेस पार्सल का अतिरिक्त शुल्क दे रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πληρώνω την επιπλέον χρέωση για το δέμα εξπρές.
translations.id: Saya membayar biaya tambahan untuk paket kilat.
translations.ja: 速達の小包の追加料金を支払います。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an accusative object.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'zahle'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating what the surcharge is for.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Expresspaket' as object of 'für'.
Compound noun, neuter, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Hier gibt es am Wochenende einen Zuschlag.
sentences.reading: /hiːɐ ɡɪpt ɛs am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈaɪnən ˈtsuːʃlaːk/

translations.de: Hier gibt es am Wochenende einen Zuschlag.
translations.ipa: /hiːɐ ɡɪpt ɛs am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈaɪnən ˈtsuːʃlaːk/
translations.en: There’s a surcharge here on weekends.
translations.es: Aquí hay un recargo los fines de semana.
translations.fr: Ici, il y a un supplément le week-end.
translations.it: Qui c'è un supplemento nel fine settimana.
translations.pt: Aqui há taxa extra nos fins de semana.
translations.he: כאן יש תוספת תשלום בסופי השבוע.
translations.tr: Burada hafta sonları ek ücret var.
translations.vi: Ở đây có phụ phí vào cuối tuần.
translations.ar: هنا توجد رسوم إضافية في عطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Hier is er in het weekend een toeslag.
translations.hi: यहाँ सप्ताहांत पर अतिरिक्त शुल्क लगता है.
translations.el: Εδώ υπάρχει επιπλέον χρέωση τα Σαββατοκύριακα.
translations.nb: Her er det et tillegg i helgene.
translations.id: Di sini ada biaya tambahan saat akhir pekan.
translations.sv: Här är det ett tillägg på helgerna.
translations.ro: Aici există o suprataxă în weekend.
translations.da: Her er der et tillæg i weekenden.
translations.ja: ここでは週末に追加料金がかかります。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb; sentence-initial frame setting the location.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of existential idiom 'es gibt'.
Expletive/dummy pronoun; formal subject in the existential construction 'es gibt'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular (licensed by 'an dem'); temporal modifier.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'gibt' in the existential construction.

translations.pt: A taxa extra custa três euros.
translations.el: Η επιπλέον χρέωση κοστίζει τρία ευρώ.
translations.ja: 追加料金は3ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of 'kostet'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a price complement.
Cardinal numeral modifying the currency noun; part of the measure/price expression (accusative of value).
Currency noun; plural form identical to singular in this context; accusative as price complement of 'kostet'.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen keinen Zuschlag für das Gepäck.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈbʁaʊxən ˈkaɪnən ˈtsuːʃlaːk fyːɐ das ɡəˈpɛk/

translations.de: Wir brauchen keinen Zuschlag für das Gepäck.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈbʁaʊxən ˈkaɪnən ˈtsuːʃlaːk fyːɐ das ɡəˈpɛk/
translations.en: We don’t need a surcharge for the luggage.
translations.es: No necesitamos pagar recargo por el equipaje.
translations.fr: Nous n’avons pas besoin de payer de supplément pour les bagages.
translations.it: Non dobbiamo pagare alcun supplemento per i bagagli.
translations.yue: 我哋唔使為行李畀附加費。
translations.pt: Não precisamos pagar taxa extra pela bagagem.
translations.he: אנחנו לא צריכים תוספת תשלום על המטען.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không phải trả phụ phí cho hành lý.
translations.ar: لا نحتاج إلى رسوم إضافية على الأمتعة.
translations.nl: We hoeven geen toeslag voor de bagage te betalen.
translations.uk: Нам не потрібна доплата за багаж.
translations.hu: A poggyászért nem kell felárat fizetnünk.
translations.hi: सामान के लिए हमें कोई अतिरिक्त शुल्क नहीं देना है.
translations.pl: Nie musimy płacić dopłaty za bagaż.
translations.el: Δεν χρειάζεται επιπλέον χρέωση για τις αποσκευές.
translations.nb: Vi trenger ikke å betale tillegg for bagasjen.
translations.id: Kami tidak perlu membayar biaya tambahan untuk bagasi.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ikke betala något tillägg för bagaget.
translations.ro: Nu trebuie să plătim suprataxă pentru bagaje.
translations.da: Vi skal ikke betale tillæg for bagagen.
translations.fi: Meidän ei tarvitse maksaa lisämaksua matkatavaroista.
translations.ja: 荷物の追加料金は必要ありません。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Negative determiner, masculine accusative singular; negates the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP specifying what the surcharge would be for.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Gepäck' as object of 'für'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
